name: venice-forge
description: Unofficial third-party desktop client for the Venice API. Not affiliated with Venice.ai, Inc.
author: fayeblade (@spearchucker667)

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck
scripts.dist: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --publish never
scripts.dist:portable: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.ci: npm ci && npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
